sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_table SET value = 'updated' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT rowNumberInAllBlocks() AS row_num, value FROM test_table SETTINGS max_block_size = 2;
SELECT rowNumberInAllBlocks() AS row_num FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table ORDER BY id) SETTINGS max_block_size = 3;
